# kUSBInformationDeviceIsAttachedToRootHubBit

**Enumeration Case**

The USB device has directly attached to the root hub.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBInformationDeviceIsAttachedToRootHubBit = 1
```
title: kUSBInformationDeviceIsAttachedToRootHubBit
